description: Better is an online mortgage and home-finance company offering mortgage, refinance, and home equity products through a web-based application flow. Its public website focuses on consumer loan applications, calculators, and partner information.
summary: better.com exposes a detected OAuth 2.0 / OpenID Connect identity provider on prod.bettermg.com; no public developer-facing REST, GraphQL, MCP, or CLI surfaces were found on better.com.

surfaces.name: Better OAuth 2.0 / OpenID Connect identity provider
